# Introduction to the R programming language

## First lecture
### Plot example
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
x <- rnorm(10000, mean=2,sd=1) # Array of random numbers
MU <- mean(x)
SD <- sd(x)
X <- seq(from =-8, to=8,by= 0.5 )
Y <- dnorm(X,mean=MU, sd=SD)
hist(x, freq=FALSE)
lines(X,Y)
```
### Help and examples

```{r}
?plot
```

```{r}
example(hist)
```
## Third lecture
Only operations with integrants are exact
```{r}
u <- sqrt(2); u*u ==2
u*u-2
all.equal(u*u,2)
identical(u*u,2)
```

### If-else statements


```{r}
x <- 45; y<- 50
if (x<y){
    
}
```
